# growthbook_dimension (Data Source)

Look up an existing GrowthBook dimension by ID.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (String) Unique dimension identifier (e.g. `dim_...`).

### Read-Only

- `datasource_id` (String) Data source ID.
- `date_created` (String) Creation timestamp.
- `date_updated` (String) Last update timestamp.
- `description` (String) Dimension description.
- `identifier_type` (String) Identifier type.
- `managed_by` (String) Where the dimension is managed from.
- `name` (String) Dimension name.
- `owner` (String) Dimension owner.
- `query` (String) SQL query defining the dimension.
